role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed English signage and Latin script; correctly identified East African context.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on red laterite soil, hilly terrain, and building materials; stayed within geographic/visual analysis.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Musa species (bananas) and tropical broadleaf vegetation; correctly linked to regional ecology.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed utility poles, road shoulders, and building infrastructure; stayed within infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (poles, soil, architecture) to distinguish Uganda from neighbors; stayed within cross-domain synthesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly converged on Uganda. The tournament logic was sound, using the specialists' consensus to defeat the closest competitor (Kenya).
